shared_properties: Echo keeps crest, cheek patch, beak, and tail readable in every occupied frame.
Body footprint stays inside 40x40px and remains centered near x44 y42.
Core palette fields stay fixed at primary #1D2B53, background #FFF1E8, and accent #FF004D.
differences: State_sleeping uses 3 frames at 1fps with an infinite calm loop.
Eyes stay fully closed and the head stays tucked into the chest silhouette.
Crest height drops to 1px to signal a restful pose.

reference_images.label: echo_behavior_reference
reference_images.purpose: Canonical Echo behavior and pose reference for the cockatiel silhouette and state-specific acting cues.

reference_images.label: behavior_system_reference
reference_images.purpose: State machine grounding for idle, eating, sleeping, happy, preening, dirty, hungry, and singing transitions.

reference_images.label: art_direction_reference
reference_images.purpose: Palette, pixel density, outline, and 128x128 composition grounding for all Echo states.

bevy_constraints.bundle_strategy: TextureAtlas-driven sprite entity with fixed virtual-pixel scaling.
bevy_constraints.asset_loading: Load echo_sleeping_3f_1fps.png via AssetServer during Loading state, then bind handles by task_id for deterministic system lookup.
runtime_notes: Use nearest-neighbor sampling and a 128x128 virtual canvas so every authored pixel remains crisp after upscale.
Drive state swaps through atlas index changes or visibility toggles instead of runtime repainting to preserve palette invariance.
Attach marker components so CareSystem, BehaviorSystem, TimeSystem, and HUD systems can target the asset without filename inference.

pose_notes: Head tucked into feathers; crest lowered to 1px height.
Eyes fully closed in all frames.

acceptance_criteria: Sprite sheet is exactly 120x40px (3 frames × 40x40) with 0px spacing.
Animation plays at 1fps and respects loop/play_count settings in specs.animation.
Sprite remains readable at 1x scale on a 128x128 canvas; no anti-aliasing and only listed colors are used.
